title: halenia deflexa
intro: Halenia deflexa, also known as Himalayan snakeroot or Indian snakeroot, is a plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, Halenia deflexa has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Halenia deflexa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Halenia deflexa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its roots and leaves are typically dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine.
